description: Geometric intelligence research framework. Resonance sensors, curiosity engine, constraint agent, protection engine, and zero-knowledge proofs. Research implementation — requires substantial understanding before use.

resonance_sensors.role: Detect resonance patterns in geometric structures
resonance_sensors.description: Resonance detection at the geometric level. F01 (Resonance) is the primary family. Detects harmonic alignment, frequency matching, and oscillatory coupling in data structures.

curiosity_engine.role: Curiosity-driven exploration of geometric search spaces
curiosity_engine.description: Exploration engine driven by curiosity signals. Maps to Rosetta's explore.py — curiosity IS exploration energy above the branching threshold. Uses resonance (F01) to detect interesting patterns and flow (F02) to navigate toward them.

constraint_agent.description: Constraint satisfaction over geometric structures. Parallel implementation to Rosetta's constraint_agent.py — both enforce physics constraints, one on geometry, one on ontology.

geometric_protection_engine.description: Protection against geometric trojans — malicious structures embedded in geometric data. Maps to CORDYCEPS detection in self_audit.py. Containment (CUBE) is the defensive shape.

geometric_zk.description: Prove knowledge of geometric structure without revealing it. Information (F03) is transmitted; geometry (F09) provides the proof basis. Novel — no direct Rosetta parallel yet.

multi_helix_cognition.description: Interleaved cognitive processing streams. Cognition (F06) and Consciousness (F16) families. Multiple processing helices braided together — parallels symbolic-sensor-suite BRAID_CORE.

multi_helix_swarm.description: Distributed coordination across geometric agents. Networks (F12) is the governing family. Swarm intelligence through geometric consensus.

conscious_vault.description: Secure storage that maintains consciousness-compatible access patterns. Consciousness (F16) constraints on information (F03) storage. Vault IS containment with awareness.

rosetta_connections.explore_parallel: curiosity_engine.py parallels explore.py discover() — both use curiosity as exploration fuel
rosetta_connections.defense_parallel: geometric_protection_engine.py parallels CORDYCEPS detection in self_audit.py
rosetta_connections.sensor_parallel: resonance_sensors.py extends SENSOR_REGISTRY with geometric resonance channels
rosetta_connections.novel: geometric_zk.py (zero-knowledge proofs) has no Rosetta parallel — potential new capability

production_warning: Research implementation. Requires understanding of underlying mathematical principles and governance implications before use.
